monitor_the_situation.title: US Forces Attack Kabudarahang County in Central Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Kabudarahang County, Iran · 13h ago. US forces attacked Kabudarahang County in central Iran, expanding the strike campaign to a new area.

US Launches 11th Night of Airstrikes on Iran, Including Tehran and Strait of Hormuz Areas, Expanding to New Provinces and Targeting Military Sites, Naval Capabilities, and Drone Storage to Degrade Thr
— S4 · Conflict · Bushehr, Iran · 16h ago. Multiple US airstrikes targeted the city of Bushehr in southern Iran. Casualties and damage not yet confirmed.
American B-1 Bombers Head to Iran to Strike Missile Cities
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 21h ago. US B-1 bombers are en route to Iran for airstrikes on missile-related targets, the first such mission since the 40-day war.
